paragraph: Saw your recent push on AI-driven support [Chime expands AI](https://example.com/chime-ai). Acme helps B2C fintechs like yours hit 80% deflection on tier-1 tickets. Worth a 20-minute conversation?
Hi, I work at Acme and we sell AI agents. Let me know if you want to learn more.

Notion's recent doubling of headcount and enterprise push [Notion at $10B](https://example.com/notion-10b) makes deflection a real lever. We helped Webflow get to 80% AI-handled tickets and would love to compare notes.
Samsara's IoT fleet platform creates support volume that scales linearly with hardware deployments. Acme's voice + chat agents are tuned for exactly that pattern.

Saw [Rippling's recent push on global payroll](https://example.com/rippling-global). The complexity there is exactly what AI deflection helps with. Acme would be glad to share the playbook from Vanta's rollout.
